claims.summary: Projection vectors and fingerprints are deterministic across repeated runs for the same epoch.
claims.disposition: verify fixed and dynamic projection repeatability, checksums, and metadata tests

claims.summary: Projection epoch persistence should not depend on one hard-coded machine path.
claims.disposition: verify ASTRID_CODEC_RUNTIME_DIR, executable-relative resolution, and deterministic fallback behavior

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy should enter continuously around the 0.85 entropy threshold rather than pop on as a hard gate.
claims.disposition: verify the C1 smoothstep and exact 0.84/0.85/0.86 regressions

claims.summary: Replacing the legacy generator or rotating the projection basis would alter live semantic compatibility.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 operator-approved protocol and codec migration work with replay and rollback evidence
